## Code

```ts
export const x = 1;
```

## Math

Inline: $E=mc^2$.

Block:

$$
\begin{align}
a^2 + b^2 &= c^2 \\
\int_0^1 x^2\,dx &= \frac{1}{3}
\end{align}
$$
